commands.short: cube-idp stands up an internal developer platform on Kubernetes and gets out of the way

flags.usage: color output: auto|always|never (overrides NO_COLOR and CLICOLOR_FORCE)

flags.name: plain
flags.usage: force plain, non-styled output (permanent alias for --progress=plain)

flags.name: progress
flags.usage: output style: auto|plain|live|json (json is EXPERIMENTAL until the config v1 freeze)

commands.short: Write the default cube.yaml (kind + flux + traefik + gitea + argocd)

flags.name: engine
flags.usage: gitops engine: flux | argocd

flags.name: gateway-pack
flags.usage: gateway implementation pack: traefik | envoy-gateway

flags.usage: use pack dirs from a local cube-idp/packs checkout (path containing packs/<name>) instead of published OCI refs

flags.usage: cube name

commands.short: Work with cube-idp packs
Build and push the pack catalog index artifact
Build index.json over every pack directory in <packs-dir>

flags.name: digest
flags.usage: pack digest as <name>=<sha256:…> (repeatable; from `pack publish` output)

flags.name: from-registry
flags.usage: resolve digests missing from --digest by HEADing the registry (no pull)

flags.name: output
flags.usage: output path for the index JSON

flags.name: ref-base
flags.usage: OCI ref prefix pack artifacts live under

commands.short: Push a built index.json as the catalog index OCI artifact

flags.name: ref
flags.usage: target OCI ref (oci://host/repo:tag, e.g. oci://ghcr.io/cube-idp/packs/index:latest)

flags.name: file
flags.usage: path to cube.yaml

flags.usage: delivery mode for the installed packs: oci (default) or repo (editable Gitea repo; needs the gitea pack)

flags.name: available
flags.usage: list every pack in the remote catalog

commands.short: Validate a pack directory and publish it as an OCI artifact

flags.usage: target OCI ref (oci://host/repo[:tag]; the tag defaults to the pack's version)

commands.short: Publish a pack directory as an OCI artifact

flags.name: also-tag
flags.usage: additional tags for the same pushed artifact (e.g. latest); repeatable

commands.short: Search the pack catalog by name and description
Discover and manage cube-idp exec-plugins
Install a plugin from the official index (or a sha256-pinned git index with --index)

flags.usage: install from this sha256-pinned git index instead of the official OCI index

flags.name: yes
flags.usage: trust the installed plugin without prompting (official-index installs only)

commands.short: List every cube-idp-<name> plugin discovered on PATH or in the plugin install dir

flags.name: available
flags.usage: list every plugin published in the official index

commands.short: Search the official plugin index by name or description
Trust a discovered plugin: record its current sha256 so it runs without prompting
Manage git repositories in the cube's built-in Gitea
Create a Gitea repo, optionally wiring it up as an engine delivery source

flags.usage: register the repo as a continuously-synced engine delivery source

flags.usage: path to cube.yaml

diagCodes.summary: cannot read cube.yaml
cube.yaml YAML syntax or schema validation error
cube.lock unreadable or corrupt
cluster provider config mismatch (e.g., render-cluster for non-kind)
argocd pack listed while engine.type: argocd
cube.yaml already exists; refusing overwrite
an enum flag (--progress, --output) got an unrecognized value
gateway.ref points at a pack whose pack.cue name != gateway.pack
upgrade refused: see summary (was the last un-coded user-facing error)
a destructive command refused to run without confirmation (--yes / --confirm)
cluster.providerConfig was replaced by providerConfigRef/forProvider (migration required)
engine.tuning was removed (engine-as-pack) — move the knobs to engine.values as chart values of the cube-engine-<type> pack
engine.ref points at a pack whose pack.cue name != cube-engine-<engine.type>
container runtime not found
required host port already in use
low disk space in cache directory (warning)
inotify limits too low (warning, Linux-only)
git CLI missing while git-sourced packs are configured (doctor, warning)
cluster provider type unknown or unsupported
node-creation fields (extraPorts/mounts/providerConfig/kubernetesVersion) set with provider: existing (config cross-validation)
cluster does not exist; run `cube-idp up`
providerConfigRef fetch failed, unparsable, or not exactly one YAML mapping document
cluster behind context unreachable
kubeconfig load/parse/validation error
kind providerConfig merge failed
kind providerConfig structure invalid
kind cluster creation failed
cannot get kubeconfig from kind
kind cluster deletion failed
kind core injection overrode a user providerConfigRef/forProvider field (warning)
k3d providerConfig merge failed
k3d providerConfig structure invalid
k3d cluster creation failed / runtime unreachable
cannot get kubeconfig from k3d
k3d cluster deletion failed
k3d core injection overrode a user providerConfigRef/forProvider field (warning)
timed out waiting for resources to become ready
cannot build Kubernetes client
server-side apply failed
inventory read/write/parse failed
server-side diff failed
prune delete of untracked objects failed
cannot parse manifest YAML
unknown engine type in config
embedded engine install manifests invalid (RETIRED 2026-07-19 by engine-as-pack — install left the engine seam)
engine health check timed out or components not ready
flux prune/uninstall timeout
reserved: argocd gitea-fallback capability check, unbuilt by design
Poke found no delivery source (OCIRepository/GitRepository/Application) for the pack
Poke found the delivery source but could not read/update it (transient engine IO — retry)
engine.tuning.components names a component the engine's install manifests don't have (or its Deployment cannot be patched) (RETIRED 2026-07-19 by engine-as-pack — never emitted since)
engine.selfManage failed: cube-engine artifact push, self-source build/apply, or post-attach health wait — re-run `cube-idp up`
a pack's dependency did not become healthy before its wave-gated delivery (argocd)
unsupported pack ref scheme
pack values decode or type validation error
pack.cue missing, syntax error, or compilation failure
pack manifests/ directory read or YAML parse error
Helm chart load/parse/render error
remote pack source fetch/resolution failed
remote pack ref not pinned (missing @<rev> or :tag)
kustomize render failed
cnoe-compat document invalid or unsupported
cnoe:// path unresolvable
expose: block in pack.cue invalid
OCI pack pull/extract error (pullOCI failures)
cache directory access/creation error
extraction guard tripped (path traversal/symlink)
pack push (directory archive, OCI push, or tag) failed
values: set on a pack without chart.yaml — values are helm values only; use packs[].extraManifests for raw resources
packs[].extraManifests is not valid multi-doc YAML
dependsOn names a pack not in this cube
pack dependency cycle (the message shows the path)
gateway pack cannot carry a dependsOn of its own
embedded zot manifests invalid
port-forward to registry failed
OCI push (artifact staging or push) failed
remote digest resolution failed (upgrade --plan)
Gateway API HTTPRoute CRD not Established before the registry HTTPRoute apply
local CA creation/load failed
OS trust-store install failed
OS trust-store uninstall/revert failed
CoreDNS rewrite patch failed or did not roll out
server certificate issuance failed
trust state file corrupt
cube.lock missing, unreadable, or corrupt (vendor)
vendor: pull of a pinned pack/image, or writing the bundle itself, failed — produce side (vendor); the consume-side load is CUBE-7006 (bundle is complete-or-error, never partial)
vendor bundle is unreadable or corrupt (Open)
vendor bundle is missing or has corrupt content for a locked pack or image (Verify)
`up --bundle` needs a provider that node-loads images (kind/k3d); `existing` cannot
bundled image load into cluster nodes failed (kind/k3d LoadImages, consume side)
unknown command and no cube-idp-<name> plugin found on PATH
plugin trust store (~/.config/cube-idp/trust.json) read/write/hash error
plugin process failed to start/run (not the plugin's own reported exit code)
plugin refused: unknown or changed sha256, and no interactive confirmation
plugin name fails the ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*$ charset guard on `plugin install`/`plugin trust`
the official plugin index has no build for this GOOS/GOARCH (`plugin install`)
sync dir has no pack.cue and no renderable *.yaml manifests
`sync --watch` cannot start or attach the filesystem watcher
gitea admin secret missing or port-forward to the gitea pod failed
gitea REST API returned an unexpected status (create/fetch repo)
repo created but engine git source registration/apply failed
delivery: repo needs the gitea pack in spec.packs, and gitea itself cannot be repo-delivered
spoke cluster.provider invalid for spokes (k3d deferred; existing needs context; duplicate name)
spoke RBAC bootstrap apply failed
spoke ServiceAccount token issuance failed
spoke cluster create/connect failed
hub registration secret build/apply failed
spoke hub registration missing, or spoke API server unreachable from this machine

exitContract.plugin_exit_error: N (unrendered; plugin's own code propagates verbatim)
